name: Savory Traditional Bread Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a skillet over low heat.
2. Stir in the finely chopped onion and celery, cooking until the onions are soft.
3. Mix in the poultry seasoning, freshly ground pepper, salt (to taste), and bread crumbs.
4. Stuff the mixture into a turkey weighing 12-15 pounds.
